[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101010000 3
1 010010010 3
2 010001000 2
3 000010000 1
4 010101010 4
5 001000000 1
6 001110011 5
7 110100101 5

01 10 010111011 6
12 21 011101011 6
23 32 101111011 7
34 43 111110111 8
45 54 111110101 7
56 65 111011011 7
67 76 110111011 7
70 07 110111001 6

02 20 001111001 5
13 31 111111011 8
24 42 111101101 7
35 53 101110011 6
46 64 110111111 8
57 75 111111001 7
60 06 010111011 6
71 17 110101011 6

03 30 101110011 6
14 41 110101111 7
25 52 101011001 5
36 63 111111011 8
47 74 110101101 6
50 05 101110001 5
61 16 010111011 6
72 27 111101001 6

04 40 110110101 6
15 51 111111010 7
26 62 011011011 6
37 73 111111011 8
